meta.title: Francisco Vela | Professional Football Fitness Coach
meta.description: Francisco Javier Vela Terrero, Fitness Coach with over 10 years of experience in professional football. Degree in Physical Activity and Sports Science, Masters in Fitness Coaching and Injury Prevention, UEFA PRO.
meta.keywords: football fitness coach, Francisco Vela, fitness coach Spain, professional football, injury prevention, GPS football

hero.subtitle: Performance optimization, injury prevention and development of each athlete's maximum potential.

bio.text: I hold a Degree in Physical Activity and Sports Sciences, a Master's in Football Fitness Coaching, a Master's in Injury Prevention and Readaptation in Football, and an Expert Course in Training Load Control and Quantification, along with a UEFA PRO coaching licence. I have dedicated over a decade to fitness coaching in professional football, and I currently serve in that role at Chiclana CF (Spain). My career is marked by solid national experience, having led the physical preparation at clubs such as San Fernando CF, Cádiz CF and AD Llerenense.
bio.text_2: In terms of teaching, he has served as a Lecturer at the Extremaduran Football Federation and as a professor in numerous Master's programmes, Postgraduate Courses and Congresses at various universities and training centres.

timeline.desc: Professional football debut — San Fernando CD
Promoted to reserve team — Cádiz CF Balón

methodology.text: We work on every aspect that impacts performance to develop stronger, faster and more resilient athletes.

cta_banner.subtitle: Let's talk about how I can advise you or your team to reach your maximum potential.

trajectory.meta_description: Discover Francisco Vela's professional career as a fitness coach at San Fernando CD, Cádiz CF, AD Llerenense and Chiclana CF.
trajectory.bio_text_1: I was born in Cádiz on 18th June 1998. I hold a Degree in Physical Activity and Sports Science (2020). In 2021 I completed the Master's in Football Fitness Coaching and in 2022 the Master's in Injury Prevention and Readaptation in Football, both awarded by the University of Castilla La Mancha, the Association of Fitness Coaches and the Royal Madrid Football Federation. In 2025 I completed the Higher Level in Football Sports Coaching (UEFA PRO), as well as an Expert Course in Training Load Control and Quantification in Football, taught by Marcos Chena and Antonio Sánchez.
trajectory.bio_text_2: I began my professional career at San Fernando CD as fitness coach for the U19 team in the National League in 2018, alongside head coach Miguel Ángel Sánchez Reyes. After one season, I moved to Cádiz CF to lead the physical preparation of the U19 team, where I spent two seasons working with head coach Juanma Hoyos. This experience led to my promotion in July 2021 to the U23 reserve team in 1ª RFAF, where I spent 3 seasons working with coaches Jesús Velázquez and Juan Román. During this time we achieved 3 promotion play-offs and two consecutive promotions, the last to División de Honor Senior.
trajectory.bio_text_3: During 2022 and 2023 I combined my work at Cádiz by coaching the LA LIGA International Campus programmes. In my final year at Cádiz CF I served as assistant coach for the U19 International Academy on Pablo Sánchez's staff. In June 2024 I started a new adventure in Extremadura under coach Juan García, as fitness coach at AD Llerenense in Tercera RFEF, where I spent two seasons; in the first season we reached the promotion play-off to Segunda RFEF, making it to the national final (3rd round). In the second season I worked with coach José María Cidoncha. In June 2026 I began a new chapter with coach José Manuel Pérez Herrera in Andalusia, as fitness coach at Chiclana CF in Tercera RFEF.
trajectory.bio_text_4: In summary, I have accumulated a decade of uninterrupted experience at professional football clubs, standing out for my adaptive ability to apply scientific knowledge to the sporting context. As a fitness coach I consider myself passionate about the art of planning and the application of technology to sport, with extensive experience in the use of GPS technology.

education.meta_description: Francisco Vela's academic background and teaching experience: Degree in Physical Activity, Masters in Fitness Coaching and Injury Prevention, UEFA PRO.
education.teaching_intro: I have over 5 years of teaching experience. I am a regular collaborator in Master's and Expert Courses on Football Fitness Coaching at national and international level. I also frequently participate as a speaker at international courses and congresses, both in person and online (Spanish and English).

docencia.meta_description: Francisco Vela's teaching experience as a lecturer in masters programmes and courses on football fitness coaching at national and international level.

interviews.meta_description: Media interviews and appearances by Francisco Vela, professional football fitness coach.

coaching.meta_description: Personalised training programme with Francisco Vela. Evidence-based methodology for amateur, semi-professional and professional footballers.
coaching.hero_text: Maintaining a high level of physical fitness and reducing the risk of injury are key aspects of achieving optimal sports performance throughout the season. If you are looking to optimise your physical condition, I can offer you tools adapted to your needs and work contexts, backed by my 10 years of experience as a professional football fitness coach and my ongoing training in sports performance.

method_steps.title: ASSESS
method_steps.text: Designing sessions without a prior assessment is one of the most common mistakes. We will assess your physical condition to identify areas for improvement and potential deficits.

method_steps.title: PLAN
method_steps.text: Prescribe individually and precisely to maximise adaptations and minimise risks.

method_steps.title: MONITOR
method_steps.text: Quantify and control training load to detect fatigue and optimise performance.

method_steps.title: DECIDE
method_steps.text: Real feedback, daily tracking with the player in real time.

programs.title: Transitional Period (Summer)
programs.text: Face your pre-season with a solid fitness base to train safely, recover better between demanding matches and reach optimal intensity in pre-season games.

programs.title: Transitional Period (Winter)
programs.text: Maintaining fitness levels during the Christmas break is key to not losing physiological adaptations ahead of the second half of the season.

programs.title: During the Season
programs.text: Complementary training adapted to your material resources, designed based on your individual characteristics and records. It complements your professional team's daily routines.

programs.title: New Sports Project
programs.text: Get ready for when the time comes to join a new project. Build a robust physical condition; the programme adapts to the needs, resources and objectives of the athlete.

coaching.cta_text: If you want to know more about the training programme in detail, contact me.

testimonials.name: Marcos Chena
testimonials.text: I have had the opportunity to closely follow Fran's professional development and I can highlight his constant commitment to learning, continuous improvement and professional growth. He is a young fitness coach with a great ability to adapt to different work contexts, a solid foundation in monitoring and load analysis using GPS technology, and an excellent willingness to work as part of a team. Beyond his knowledge, he stands out for his approachability, his ability to build trust with players, and for contributing to a positive work environment.
testimonials.highlight: I am convinced he will continue to grow as a professional and bring great value to the projects he takes part in.

testimonials.name: Jesús Velázquez
testimonials.text: Fran Vela is a fitness coach I trust completely and an excellent person. Over three seasons we had the opportunity to grow professionally together, sharing experiences, learning and a shared vision of work. He stands out for his great capacity for effort, commitment and daily dedication. He has a thorough command of physical load planning and monitoring, which contributes significantly to injury prevention and player performance. He also designs and adapts field sessions with great judgement and effectiveness. His ability to interpret and apply different training methodologies allows him to integrate quickly into any context. In our case, he adapted immediately to my style of play, always bringing solutions and value to the coaching staff.
testimonials.highlight: His professionalism and human quality make him a very important asset for any sporting project.

testimonials.name: Juan García
testimonials.text: Working with Fran was always easy — great attitude, a willingness to engage in dialogue, and decision-making always backed by solid arguments thanks to his education.
testimonials.highlight: A professional with a tremendous future.

testimonials.name: Dani Romera
testimonials.text: Francisco Vela is a fitness coach who stands out for his enormous capacity for work, his commitment and his daily dedication. He is a true hard worker, always willing to keep learning and give his best. Furthermore, he possesses great knowledge in the field of fitness coaching and analysis using GPS technology.
testimonials.highlight: His professionalism, seriousness and human quality make him a highly recommended colleague and a person who can be fully trusted.
